title: Elephant
body:
Elephant - Electrophysiology Analysis Toolkit

Elephant package analyses all sorts of neurophysiological data: spike trains, LFP, analog signals. The input-output data format is either Neo, Quantity or Numpy array. More Information Documentation: https://elephant.readthedocs.io/en/latest/ Mailing list: https://groups.google.com/group/neuralensemble * Maintainer: contact[at]python-elephant[dot]org Visualization of Elephant analysis objects Viziphant package (https://github.com/INM-6/viziphant) is developed by Elephant team for plotting and visualization of the output of Elephant functions in a few lines of code.
